title: Mike Wozniak: The Bench
full_description: A new stand-up show in which a story about a bench will be prominent. Previous experience of or strong opinions about benches not required — let Mike worry about that. As seen on Taskmaster, Man Down and Junior Taskmaster; as heard on Three Bean Salad podcast.
ai_summary: Mike Wozniak — the quietly unhinged comedian of Taskmaster fame — builds an hour around a story about a bench with his characteristic deadpan precision. The kind of show where the promise of 'it's about a bench' somehow turns into something more.
